/usr/bin/c++ -pthread -Wl,-z,defs -fvisibility=hidden CMakeFiles/hpx_matmul.dir/multiplication.cpp.o -o hpx_matmul  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/hpx/lib /usr/local/hpx/lib/libhpx_wrap.a /usr/local/hpx/lib/libhpx_init.a /usr/local/hpx/lib/libhpx.so.2.0.0 /usr/local/hpx/lib/libhpx_core.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libhwloc.so -ldl -lrt -Wl,-wrap=main
